params.description: Data table appears showing the class collected data: Red blocks, Blue blocks, Green blocks, Yellow blocks with their counts.
Vertical bar graph appears with Scale Preview System showing four clickable scale buttons: Scale of 1, Scale of 2, Scale of 5, Scale of 10. Graph displays with Scale of 1 initially.

beats.text: You know how to use different scales. But which one should you use for YOUR data?
Let's find out. Click each scale to see what the graph would look like.
Click each scale button to explore how the graph changes.

validator.description: Student has clicked all four scale options (1, 2, 5, 10) to explore freely

beats.text: All four scales work for this data! You have choices.

elements.description: Data table showing class collected block counts.
Vertical bar graph in reading mode with Scale Preview System. Four scale buttons (1, 2, 5, 10) clickable. Graph displays based on selected scale.
